compiled_state.title: Rename dso-named identifiers: _is_dso_label/has_dso_label/dso_label in the reconciler
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
The label SCHEME was already migrated to rebar-id-*/imported:* (commit 613afb5); only symbol names kept dso. Sites: reconcile_check.py:82 (_is_dso_label), :92-93, :261-264 (has_dso_label); applier.py:1660-1668 (dso_label local). Rename to _is_rebar_internal_label / rebar_id_label. Internal-only: no test asserts the symbol names (test_rebar_id_label_writers.py tests behavior).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No dso-named identifiers in rebar_reconciler/ source
- [ ] Behavior unchanged; reconciler suites green

comments.body: Done in commit 39dbfba. Full suite 1300 passed / 2 xfailed; targeted bash suites for touched scripts green.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
